heading: Definitions
label: 11317 Definitions
notes: Amendments2004—Par. (1). substituted “United States Interagency Council on Homelessness” for “Interagency Council on the Homeless”.Pub. L. 108–199
amendments: Amendments2004—Par. (1). substituted “United States Interagency Council on Homelessness” for “Interagency Council on the Homeless”.Pub. L. 108–199

children.text: The term “Council” means the United States Interagency Council on Homelessness established in .section 11311 of this title
The term “Federal agency” has the meaning given the term “agency” in .section 551(1) of title 5
